title: Some of Our Group
tags: venice people italy building dinner bread table restaurant glasses bottles paintings worldheritagesite buns cosmostour6330
description: We were staying in a Venice area and some of us went out for the evening meal in Venice that night. Night 4 of our Cosmos tour, October 3, 2012. Venice is a city in northeastern Italy sited on a group of 118 small islands separated by canals and linked by bridges. It is located in the marshy Venetian Lagoon which stretches along the shoreline between the mouths of the Po and the Piave Rivers. Venice is renowned for the beauty of its setting, its architecture and its artworks. The city in its entirety is listed as a World Heritage Site, along with its lagoon. For More Info: en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Venice

title: Dinner at Al Fontego dei Pescatori
tags: venice food fish dinner yum shrimp cod venezia sardines 2011 alfontegodeipescatori
description: After a very long day of getting from Vienna to Venice, we were h.u.n.g.r.y. But we were ill equipped to search for a good place to eat. Eschewing the touristy spots (yes they exist even off the main drags) we ended up here. It was really just perfect for the evening. It was dumb luck.  Sarde al saor, tiny little shrimp, crab meat, mantis shrimp (HOLY COW!), a fish paste of some sort and a cod mousse. In the center was perfect polenta.

tags: venice dinner menu yum january 2010 60225mm ilridotto
description: This one would probably stump Rick and Trisha, *first* in that I even ordered a dessert, and second, that it wasn't tiramisu.  Knowing those two items, however, would probably lead them to correctly guess that I got the pistachio trio.

title: Il Ridotto's other 2.5  tables
tags: venice dinner yum january 2010 60225mm ilridotto
description: There was one more table for two to my left, and that was it;  the kitchen was around the corner to the left, beyond the cabinent.

title: Il Ridotto's primis
tags: venice dinner menu yum january 2010 60225mm ilridotto
description: I couldn't make up my mind between the ravioli and the risotto;  I asked the chef and owner who was also doing the table service and telling us about the food and generally being awesome for a recommendation, and he said that they were both very different;  he said that since "the lady" had also ordered the risotto, he could make me a half portion of that and the ravioli.  It was €25 for both.  Rad.  =)

title: Il Ridotto

title: Risotto alle erbe fini di S. Erasmo in fumetto di pesci e crostacei
tags: venice dinner yum january 2010 60225mm ilridotto
description: I'm not a risotto expert, but this was really, really good.  Once again, this was a half portion, so don't go freaking about Venetian portions and prices;  Gianni doesn't skimp.

title: Ravioli di gamberi, essenza di pomodoro e ricotta fresca
tags: venice dinner yum january 2010 60225mm ilridotto
description: The risotto was served to me first, but just as I'd touched my fork to the dish he came with my other primi and pulled the risotto away, letting me know the ravioli were better experienced first.  He was right.    These were amazing, with a nice light freshness -- not mentioned in the description is the orange zest or something that was used in the sauce, really adding to the depth.  If anything was a let down here, it was probably the prawns themselves -- they were a little flavorless and the texture didn't mesh with the rest of the dish.

title: Entertainers
tags: venice italy musician music dinner europe worldheritagesite singer accordian
description: This is probably the best dinner of whole trip. The first course was lots of assorted appetizers - bread dipped in olive oil and Parmesan cheese, bread with a tomato-paste-type covering, seafood salad, cold meats, as well as fancy zucchini slices. The second course was a creamy vegetarian lasagna and a nice rice dish. For the third course I had pork topped with a cream sauce and potato on the side. (A fish entree and a mushroom crepe were also available). For dessert there were ball-shaped cupcakes that were covered with chocolate mousse. Being in Italy, there was also lots of wine with the dinner. Also, the guys pictured above provided entertainment throughout the meal.
